Tests for `Function.prototype` immutability, non-enumerability, deletion, and property definition.


## Files
- **[15.03.03.01-001.js](15.03.03.01-001.js.md)**: Tests the immutability of `Function.prototype` by attempting to modify and invoke it.
- **[15.03.03.01-002.js](15.03.03.01-002.js.md)**: Tests the non-enumerability of the 'prototype' property in the Function object.
- **[15.03.03.01-003.js](15.03.03.01-003.js.md)**: Tests the deletion of `Function.prototype` and verifies its absence using an assertion.
- **[15.03.03.01-004.js](15.03.03.01-004.js.md)**: Tests the definition and retrieval of a function's prototype property using `Object.defineProperty`.
